titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Jacqueline Woodson Papers
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday March 6, 2025 at 23:00

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: This collection consists of writings, correspondence, notebooks, journals, papers related to appearances and readings, printed materials, writings of others, photographs, personal papers, artwork, computer media, and audiovisual materials by or related to author Jaqueline Woodson. Writings comprise the bulk of the collection, documenting Woodson's writings for children, young adults, and adults, spanning novels including Another Brooklyn (Harper Collins, 2016), Brown Girl Dreaming (Penguin, 2014), and Miracle's Boys (Penguin, 2000), and picture books including We Had a Picnic This Sunday Past (Hyperion, 1997), Show Way (Putnam, 2005), and The Day You Begin (Nancy Paulsen Books, 2018). Many drafts include annotations and corrections by Woodson and editor Nancy Paulsen. Writings also include works for stage and screen, speeches, short stories, and poetry.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research.
Boxes 62-64 (computer media) Restricted fragile material. Access copies of digital files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.
Box 65 (audiovisual materials) Restricted fragile material. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Jacqueline Woodman Papers is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the auhors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Cumberland Rare Books on the James Weldon Johnson Memorial Collection of Negro Arts & Letters Fund, the Jockey Hollow Fund, and the Edwin J. Beinecke Book Fund, 2021.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Jacqueline Woodson Papers. James Weldon Johnson Memorial Collection in the Yale Collection of American Literature, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into eleven series: I. Writings, 1980-2019. II. Correspondence, 1983-2021. III. Notebooks and journals, 1986-2018. IV. Papers related to appearances and readings, 1996-2019. V. Printed materials, 1989-2018. VI. Writings of others, 1991-1997. VII. Photographs, undated. VIII. Personal papers, 1981-2019. IX. Artwork, undated. X. Computer media, undated. XI. Audiovisual materials, 1994, undated.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections as they are acquired, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.
This collection received a basic level of processing, including rehousing and minimal organization.

Information included in the Description of Papers note and Collection Contents section is drawn from information supplied with the collection and from an initial survey of the contents. Folder titles appearing in the contents list below are often based on those provided by the creator or previous custodian. Titles have not been verified against the contents of the folders in all cases. Otherwise, folder titles are supplied by staff during initial processing.
This finding aid may be updated periodically to account for new acquisitions to the collection or revisions in arrangement and description.

bioghist.head: Jacqueline Woodson
bioghist.p: Jacqueline Woodson (born 1963) is a writer and poet known for her children's books, young adult books, and novels. Her work is noted for themes relating to race, sexuality, and gender identity. Woodson's publications include We Had a Picnic This Sunday Past (Hyperion, 1997), Miracle's Boys (Penguin, 2000), Brown Girl Dreaming (Penguin, 2014), for which she won the 2014 National Book Award in Young People's Literature, and Another Brooklyn (Harper Collins, 2016), among others. She was named a MacArthur Fellow in 2020.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into six subseries: Novels, 1990-2019; Stage, 2013; Picture books, 1997-2018; Screenwriting, 2007-2018; Speeches, 1998-2019; and Short or unfinished writings, 1980-2019.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged in chronological order by work.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The novels subseries consists of manuscripts, typescripts, edited drafts, proofs, reseach materials, correspondence, editor notes, cover designs, and other papers relating to novels by Woodson.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This file contains manuscript notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This file contains sample chapter and outline with manuscript comments.

did.unittitle: House you pass on the way

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Working title: Staggerlee. Files contain typescripts with manuscript edits and comments by Wendy Lamb and Jacqueline Woodson, typescript notes, and draft fragments.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Foreword for 20th anniversary edition, typescript.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This file contains partial typescripts with manuscript comments by Nancy Paulson and manuscript edits by Jacqueline Woodsoon. Pp 13-97.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These files contain typescripts with manuscript comments by Nancy Paulson and manuscript edits by Jacqueline Woodson, cover letters, suggested cover photographs, typescript printouts with comments by Stephanie Grant, Sara Kreger, cover letter from Amy Acorn, correspondence, and cover art.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The files contain typescripts, various drafts, with manuscript edits and comments by Jacqueline Woodson, Nancy Paulson, Hilary Sio, Juliet Widoff, Gloria Fisk, cover letters, notes, and typescript printout.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The files contain typescripts, various drafts, with manuscript edits and comments by Jacqueline Woodson, Nancy Paulson, Hilary Sio, Juliet Widoff, Gloria Fisk, cover letters, notes, and typescript printout.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These files contain typescripts, various drafts, with manuscript edits by Jaqueline Woodson, comments by Faedra Carpenter, correspondence and notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The files contain typescripts, various drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These files contain holograph, typescripts, various drafts, with manuscript edits by Jacqueline Woodson and Nancy Paulsen, typescript printout with copy editing notes by Cindy Howle, and correspondence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These files contain holograph, typescripts, various drafts, with manuscript edits by Jacqueline Woodson and Nancy Paulsen, typescript printout with copy editing notes by Cindy Howle,and correspondence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These files contain typescripts, various drafts, with manuscript edits and comments by Jacqueline Woodson, and Nancy Paulsen, correspondence and comments from Stephanie Grant.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These files contain typescripts, various drafts, with manuscript edits and comments by Jacqueline Woodson, and Nancy Paulsen, correspondence and comments from Stephanie Grant.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Working title: Letters to Lily. These files contain typescripts, various drafts, with manuscript edits and comments by Jacqueline Woodson and Nancy Paulsen, with related emails, typescript printout, and parital typescripts and printed lyrics to Stay Gold by Stevie Wonder.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These files contain typescripts, various drafts, with edits and comments by Jacqueline Woodson and Nancy Paulsen, notes, miscellaneous, and partial screenplay by Brooklyn Deeme.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These files contain typescripts, various drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These fles contain typescripts, various drafts, with manuscripts and comments by Jacqueline Woodson and Nancy Paulsen, partial typescript for audio book, correspondence, bound typescripts, and corrected proofs.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These files contain typescripts, various drafts, with manuscripts and comments by Jacqueline Woodson and Nancy Paulsen, partial typescript for audio book, correspondence, bound typescripts, and corrected proofs.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These files contain typescripts, various drafts, with manuscripts and comments by Jacqueline Woodson and Nancy Paulsen, partial typescript for audio book, correspondence, bound typescripts, and corrected proofs.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This file contains a proof.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These files contain typescripts, various drafts, with manuscript edits by Jacqueline Woodson.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These files contain typescripts, various drafts, with manuscript edits and comments by Jacqueline Woodson, Rosemarie Robotham, Laura Brown, typescript printouts with comments and edits, reader and editor notes, style sheets, research materials, drafts of front matter, cover designs, publicity, marketing materials, film adaptation by Lacey Schwartz and Mehret Mandefro, typescripts, various drafts, scene cards, and notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These files contain typescripts, various drafts, with manuscript edits and comments bu Jacqueline Woodson, Rosemarie Robotham, Laura Brown, typescript printouts with comments and edits, reader and editor notes, style sheets, research materials, drafts of front matter, cover designs, publicity, marketing materials, film adaptation by Lacey Schwartz and Mehret Mandefro, typescripts, various drafts, scene cards,and notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These files contain typescripts, various drafts, with manuscript edits and comments bu Jacqueline Woodson, Rosemarie Robotham, Laura Brown, typescript printouts with comments and edits, reader and editor notes, style sheets, research materials, drafts of front matter, cover designs, publicity, marketing materials, film adaptation by Lacey Schwartz and Mehret Mandefro, typescripts, various drafts, scene cards, and notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These files contain scene cards and notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Working titles: Writing in American class, The art room. Files contain typescripts, various drafts, with manuscript edits by Jacqueline Woodson and Nancy Palsen.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Working title: Dream of America. Files contain typescripts, various drafts, with manuscript edits and printed comments by Jacqueline Woodson and Nancy Paulsen,correspondence, typescript printout with printed comments by Jacqueline Woodson and Nancy Paulsen, chapter outlines, character notes, manuscript notes by Toshi Reagon, and miscellaneous fragments.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Working title: Dream of America. Files contain typescripts, various drafts, with manuscript edits and printed comments by Jacqueline Woodson and Nancy Paulsen, correspondence, typescript printout with printed comments by Jacqueline Woodson and Nancy Paulsen, chapter outlines, character notes, manuscript notes by Toshi Reagon, miscellaneous fragments.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These files contain typescript, various drafts, pages with printed comments by copy editor and Sarah McGrath.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These files contain typescripts, various drafts, typescript print outs with mansucripts edits by Jacqueline Woodson, miscellaneous fragments, outtakes, timelines and notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries consists of materials related to the opera, Zinnias: The Life of Clementine Hunter, for which Woodson wrote the story and book and Bernice Johnson Reagon and Toshi Reagon wrote the libretto and music.

did.unittitle: Zinnias: The Life of Clementine Hunter

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The files contain research, outline, and typescripts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries consists of manuscripts, typescripts, artwork, mock-ups, dummies, page proofs, and other papers related to picture books written by Jacqueline Woodson.

scopecontent.p: The files contain proofs with color swatches, and page proof sheets with color separations, some with manuscript notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These files mock-up with sketches and manuscript edits by Jacqueline Woodson, design proofs, redesign, with letter from Donna Bray.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The screenwriting subseries includes notes from a screenwriting class, a screenplay fragment, and screenplays and related material for You'll Come Running and Bosvick, Bushwick or The Matchbox.

scopecontent.p: This file contains a typescript.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This file contains an outline and first act, multiple drafts with comments from readers, typescript with manuscript comments and emails.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This file contains a TV pitch, fifteen drafts, typescript, with manuscript edits and notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries consists of speeches given by Woodson between 1998 and 2019.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries consists of drafts of short stories, essays, novel fragments, poems, and lists, as well as royalties and contracts.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Most of the materials in this subseries are in the folders as received. The folders are marked as "Misc 1" through "Misc 54". There are no folders "Misc 4" or "Misc 21".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents

scopecontent.p: These files contain five drafts, with additional chapters, typescript with manuscript corrections, and reader comments.

scopecontent.p: This file contains Mama, from Growing up; White people, from Good Christian peoples, Shacks, from The dear one/when it somes down to it/Black poetry, unidentified fragment, One a hill far away, photocopy, by Annie Dillard.

did.unittitle: Miscellaneous fragments, writings, lists, notes, resumes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Corespondence consists of letters to Woodson from editors, fans, and various personal acquaintances. Also includes letters from students in response to school visits.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: First editors.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials and correspondence relating to school visits and appearances.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials and correspondence relating to school visits and appearances.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series consists of notebooks and journals kept by Jacqueline Woodson. Notebooks contain varying amounts of text, which ranges from writing fragments, notes, sketches, lists, recipes, schedules, and other items. Most of the notebooks are undated. There is one substantial journal from 1990-1991 and planning diaries from the 1990s.

did.unittitle: Papers related to appearances and readings

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series consists of papers documenting appearances and readings by Jacqueline Woodson.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials relating to readings, awards, and festivals including publicity materials and programs.

scopecontent.p: Materials relating to readings, awards, and festivals including publicity materials and programs.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Printed materials consist of marketing and publicity materials for Woodson's books as well as printed items containing contributions by Woodson.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials relating to marketing and publicity for books including discussion guides, alternate covers, book marks, reviews, and other papers.

scopecontent.p: Materials relating to marketing and publicity for books including discussion guides, alternate covers, book marks, reviews, and other papers.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Writings of others consists of work by Tim Seibles, Gayle Forman, Nick Flynn, and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The photographs series consists of personal and professional photographs of Jacqueline Woodson.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Personal papers consist of Woodson's high school diploma, historical research, family papers, and other papers.

did.unittitle: Portfolio of reproductions of Swedish illustrations

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Presented to Woodson while visiting Sweden in 2018 to receive the Astrid Lindgren Memorial Award.

did.unittitle: David Diaz drawings of Jacqueline Woodson

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted fragile material. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

did.unittitle: Jacqueline Woodson Jeg ville ikke have sagt det, tape 1
did.materialspec: The program is distorted at times. Static is present. The program was recorded at a very high level. Crosstalk on the program is present.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Audiovisual material. Restricted fragile. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

did.unittitle: Jacqueline Woodson Jeg ville ikke have sagt det, tape 2
did.materialspec: The program is distorted at times. Static is present.
